title: rosa flexuosa subsp. subolida
intro: Rosa flexuosa subsp. subolida is a subspecies of the Rosa flexuosa plant, commonly known as the fragrant rose or climbing rose. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa flexuosa subsp. subolida include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
